entities.name: HALT check
entities.context: Framework for checking if Hungry, Angry, Lonely, or Tired when experiencing urges

entities.name: Underlying Need
entities.context: Identifying what an urge is trying to provide - escape, relief, numbness, comfort, stimulation, connection, or reward

entities.name: Body Awareness
entities.context: Technique for locating urges physically and noticing tension or sensations

entities.name: Alternative Paths
entities.context: Finding other ways to meet the underlying need without engaging the urge

entities.name: Urge Management Framework
entities.context: Structured coaching protocol with numbered steps for processing urges

relationships.context: HALT check is used as a diagnostic step within the urge management process
Step 3 in the framework for identifying what need the urge is trying to meet
Step 4 in the framework for physical awareness of urges
Step 5 in the framework for finding healthier alternatives
Physical sensations help identify the underlying emotional need
